title: Sculk Vials
description: adds sculk vials that can store up to 30 levels of exp
body:
Simple datapack that add the "Sculk Vial" tool that let you keep your precius experience in it and release it at need 

Right click - store expirience.
Shift + Left click - withraw stored experience.

Recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a59c6898275f44d3b13fbef416aa99803b35d72.png)
#

## installation :
- Tutorial for datapack installation [link]([https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack))
- For mod version - just put it in the mod folder
<details>

<summary>Where to find the resourcepack?
</summary>


Go to the [version page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sculkvial/versions) and find the version you want that labeled as datapack.

Click on the version and fine the attached files at the bottom and download the file "rp" in the name  "rp".

please keep in mind that every RP version work only with the matching DP version
Have fun !
## 
## ![resourcepack tutorial 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f2041aa9c17479ae1a975c365a87ed9775564e.png)
## 
![resourcepack tutorial 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52219fb630936127b13e93e4b99c482de4335b7.png)


</details>

## Features (v2.0+):
- adds sculk vial that can store up to 30 levels of xp
- not mandatory resourcepack 
- Server side only
- better performance with only 1 ticking advancement
- Using Smithed conventions for compatibility with other packs


## Compatibility:
- Using Smithed conventions for compatibility with other packs
- no known incompatibilities with mods 

## Dependencies :
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api))
##
